arts.ttl: Jota 'agrees' astonishing Celtic transfer return with eye-popping Rennes signing swap for Kyogo
arts.sum: The beloved winger is heading back to Glasgow 18 months after heading to Saudi Arabia in a £25m deal

arts.ttl: Celtic's Kyogo set to join Rennes, say French club
arts.sum: Kyogo Furuhashi could complete a move from Celtic and make his debut for Rennes against Monaco on Saturday, says the Ligue 1 club's head coach Jorge Sampaoli.

arts.ttl: Celtic striker Kyogo Furuhashi in Rennes to undergo medical

arts.ttl: Preview: Monaco vs. Rennes - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Ligue 1 clash between Monaco and Rennes, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
